mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prplchecktask (checklongitude, checklatitude, checkdate, checksite) VALUES (#{checklongitude}, #{checklatitude}, #{checkdate}, #{checksite})
mapper.update: UPDATE prplchecktask SET checklongitude = #{checklongitude}, checklatitude = #{checklatitude}, checkdate = #{checkdate}, checksite = #{checksite} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ROUND(checklongitude, 3) as lng, ROUND(checklatitude, 3) as lat, COUNT(*) as count FROM prplchecktask WHERE checkdate = #{date} AND checklongitude IS NOT NULL AND checklatitude IS NOT NULL AND checklongitude != 0 AND checklatitude != 0 AND checklongitude >= 102.5 AND checklongitude <= 104.9 AND checklatitude >= 30.0 AND checklatitude <= 31.5 GROUP BY ROUND(checklongitude, 3), ROUND(checklatitude, 3) ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM prplchecktask WHERE checkdate = #{date}
